title: bupleurum collinum
intro: Bupleurum collinum, also known as Chinese Thorowax or Small Hare's Ear, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to China and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antipyretic effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Bupleurum collinum include its ability to relieve stress, anxiety, and depression, as well as its potential to lower fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Bupleurum collinum can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
